item.title: India AI Impact Summit 2026: US Partnerships & AI Launches
item.description: India AI Impact Summit 2026: TCS-OpenAI, Infosys-Anthropic partnerships + Sarvam Kaze smartglasses launch. What it means for Indian tech jobs.
